headline: UK Cards and Payments Market Insights 2021-2025 and Growth Outlook 2026-2030 Featuring Lloyds Banking Group, NatWest Group, Barclays, HSBC, Santander and More
summary: Key market opportunities include the rise of e-commerce, growth of open banking with Paytently and Mastercard's collaboration, and increasing popularity of contactless payments exemplified by Edinburgh's Tap-on, Tap-off systemDublin, May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "UK Cards and Payments: Opportunities and Risks to 2030" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.
